requirement_topic.en: Sahim Rooftop Solar and Nama Distribution Connection
requirement_topic.zh: Sahim 屋顶光伏与 Nama 配电接入
requirement_topic.zht: Sahim 屋頂光伏與 Nama 配電接入

summary.en: Oman's Sahim rooftop-solar route is a project and distribution-connection process, not only a product standard. The inverter package may need to support customer application documents, distribution-company technical review, qualified installer work, metering arrangements, export-limitation or anti-islanding settings where required, labels, manuals, and commissioning records for the exact rooftop configuration.
summary.zh: 阿曼 Sahim 屋顶光伏路径是项目和配电接入流程，不只是产品标准。逆变器资料包可能需要支持客户申请文件、配电公司技术审查、合格安装人员施工、电表安排、被要求时的限发或防孤岛参数、标签、说明书以及准确屋顶配置的调试记录。
summary.zht: 阿曼 Sahim 屋頂光伏路徑是專案和配電接入流程，不只是產品標準。逆變器資料包可能需要支持客戶申請文件、配電公司技術審查、合格安裝人員施工、電表安排、被要求時的限發或防孤島參數、標籤、說明書以及準確屋頂配置的調試記錄。

standards_or_laws: APSR Sahim rooftop solar programme requirements where applicable
Applicable metering, anti-islanding, protection, labeling, and commissioning requirements

summary.en: China domestic distributed-PV acceptance records, GB/T 37408 tests, GB/T 19964 evidence, IEC 62109 certificates, and factory setting sheets can support due diligence but do not prove Sahim enrollment or Nama distribution-company acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国国内分布式光伏验收记录、GB/T 37408 测试、GB/T 19964 证据、IEC 62109 证书和工厂参数表可支持尽调，但不能证明已完成 Sahim 登记或已获 Nama 配电公司接受。
summary.zht: 中國國內分散式光伏驗收記錄、GB/T 37408 測試、GB/T 19964 證據、IEC 62109 證書和工廠參數表可支持盡調，但不能證明已完成 Sahim 登記或已獲 Nama 配電公司接受。

gap.en: Before shipment, confirm whether the installation is Sahim rooftop, another behind-the-meter route, or a larger distribution-connected project. Align inverter model, firmware profile, anti-islanding, export control, meter interfaces, labels, manuals, installer documentation, and commissioning checklist with that route.
gap.zh: 出货前应确认安装属于 Sahim 屋顶光伏、其他表后路径还是较大的配电接入项目。应使逆变器型号、固件配置、防孤岛、限发控制、电表接口、标签、说明书、安装商文件和调试清单与该路径一致。
gap.zht: 出貨前應確認安裝屬於 Sahim 屋頂光伏、其他表後路徑還是較大的配電接入專案。應使逆變器型號、韌體配置、防孤島、限發控制、電表介面、標籤、說明書、安裝商文件和調試清單與該路徑一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for projects using the Sahim rooftop-solar or Nama distribution-connection route; otherwise distributor and project-owner requirements still need separate confirmation
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese distributed-PV acceptance is not recognized as Oman Sahim enrollment or Nama distribution approval

source.publisher: Oman Authority for Public Services Regulation (APSR)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Sahim is a deployment and connection route. The inverter file should support the customer, installer, metering, anti-islanding, and Nama distribution-review process.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] Sahim 是部署和接入路径。逆变器资料应支持客户、安装商、电表、防孤岛和 Nama 配电审查流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] Sahim 是部署和接入路徑。逆變器資料應支持客戶、安裝商、電表、防孤島和 Nama 配電審查流程。
